title: Blessed Are Those

sections.label: Intro
lines: Breathe the beauty of dawn’s first light,
Let your soul take flight tonight,
A melody of hope, deep and wide,
Praise fills the air, love won't hide.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sing out, my heart, for the breath of today,
Life is a gift that cannot decay.
Not in princes, nor mortal hands,
But in the eternal, my refuge stands.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: For the Maker of stars, the sea, and sky,
Holds the truth, and will never lie.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, blessed are those whose hope will remain,
In the God of love, who ends all pain.
Forever faithful, through shadows and rain,
Oh, blessed are those who call His name.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He lifts the broken, brings justice near,
Gives voice to silence, dispels all fear.
Food for the hungry, sight to the blind,
In His embrace, a love divine.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, blessed are those whose hope will remain,
In the God of love, who ends all pain.
Forever faithful, through shadows and rain,
Oh, blessed are those who call His name.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Praise echoes softly through the night,
Faith shines brighter than any light.
The song of souls will never wane,
Oh, blessed are those who call His name.

epigraph: Praise ye the LORD. Praise the LORD
